title: Learn Java
description: Learn Java programming language within a month using our practical course. Write tons of code, solve over 500 coding problems and build beginner level projects. An excellent starting point to begin your programming journey.

modules.description: Write your 1st Java code and Learn how to make Java output whatever you want.

modules.name: Strings and Text processing
modules.description: Learn about Java String operations like creation, concatenation, immutability, comparison, and manipulation using methods such as substring(), indexOf(), and replace(). These concepts are widely used in applications like data validation, input parsing, search engines, text processing, and building user-facing applications.
